description_en: Wrocław may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 164 halal restaurants and 1 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Wrocław, Poland, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Wrocław: 146 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
